examples: It was a tilbury harnessed to a small white horse.
"If you are including tilbury" said he "it don't apply."
The tilbury and the horse will be in front of my door to-morrow morning at half-past four o 'clock.
The most likely spots for flood storage are between the barrier and Tilbury, to the east.
The pair had pleaded guilty at last year's pre-trial hearing to their part in the export of the waste out of Felixstowe and Tilbury.
